questions.question: Workshop mein kaam karte samay kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Fashionable Cap

questions.explanation: Safety Goggles aankhon ko wood chips aur dust se bachane ke liye sabse zaroori PPE hai.

questions.question: Ek hand saw ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Wood ko kaatna

questions.explanation: Hand saw ka mukhya kaam wood ko manually kaatna hai.

questions.question: Chisel ka upyog kis kaam ke liye kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Wood mein hole karne ke liye
options.B: Wood ko smooth karne ke liye
options.C: Wood se small pieces remove karne ya shaping ke liye
options.D: Wood ko sand karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Chisel ka upyog wood se small pieces hataane, joints banane, ya shaping ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar aap circular saw use kar rahe hain, toh kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Blade guard ko hata dena
options.C: Workpiece ko acchi tarah se clamp karna

questions.explanation: Circular saw use karte samay workpiece ko acchi tarah se clamp karna zaroori hai taaki woh slip na ho aur accident na ho.

questions.question: Hammer ka sabse common use kya hai?

options.B: Nails ko drive karna

questions.explanation: Hammer ka sabse aam upyog nails ko wood mein thokna hai.

questions.question: Safety Gloves kab pehne chahiye?

options.A: Jab bhi heavy lifting kar rahe ho
options.B: Jab bhi tools handle kar rahe ho ya rough material se deal kar rahe ho
options.C: Jab bhi painting kar rahe ho

questions.explanation: Safety Gloves hathon ko cuts, splinters, aur abrasions se bachane ke liye zaroori hain, especially jab tools ya rough material handle kar rahe ho.

questions.question: Power tools ko use karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Power cord damaged toh nahi hai

questions.explanation: Power tools use karne se pehle power cord ko damage ke liye check karna bahut zaroori hai, taaki electrical hazards se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Bench vise ka kya function hai?

options.B: Workpiece ko firmly hold karna

questions.explanation: Bench vise ka upyog workpiece ko securely hold karne ke liye hota hai, taaki us par kaam karte samay stability bani rahe.

questions.question: Jab aap ek sharp chisel use kar rahe hain, toh aapki body position kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Chisel ke cutting path ke line mein
options.B: Chisel ke cutting path se dur

questions.explanation: Sharp chisel use karte samay apni body ko cutting path se dur rakhna chahiye taaki slip hone par injury na ho.

questions.question: Hearing protection (ear muffs/plugs) kab zaroori hai?

options.A: Jab bhi koi tool use kar rahe ho
options.B: Jab bhi loud machinery chal rahi ho
options.D: Jab bhi painting kar rahe ho

questions.explanation: Loud machinery se hone wale noise se hearing loss ho sakta hai, isliye hearing protection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Measure tape ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Wood ko kaatna
options.C: Lambai, chaudai aur unchai ko measure karna

questions.explanation: Measure tape ka mukhya upyog dimensions ko accurate tarike se measure karna hai.

questions.question: Screwdriver kis kaam aata hai?

options.B: Screws ko tight ya loose karne ke liye
options.C: Wood mein hole karne ke liye
options.D: Metal sheet ko kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Screwdriver screws ko manually tight ya loose karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Jack plane ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.A: Rough wood surface ko smooth aur flat banane ke liye
options.B: Wood mein holes karne ke liye
options.C: Wood ko cross-cut karne ke liye
options.D: Wood ko paint karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Jack plane rough wood surface ko smooth aur flat karne ke liye use hota hai, especially large surfaces par.

questions.question: Agar workshop mein aag lag jaaye, toh sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Aag bujhaane ki koshish karna chahe kitni bhi badi ho
options.C: Electric supply band karna aur fire alarm bajana
options.D: Workshop se bahar bhaag jana bina kisi ko bataye

questions.explanation: Electrical fires ke case mein electric supply band karna aur fire alarm bajakar sabko alert karna sabse pehla aur zaroori step hai.

questions.question: Drill machine ka upyog kya hai?

options.B: Wood mein holes karna

questions.explanation: Drill machine ka mukhya upyog wood ya other materials mein holes karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek try square ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: 90 degree angles ko mark aur check karna

questions.explanation: Try square ka upyog 90 degree angles (right angles) ko mark karne aur check karne ke liye hota hai, jo carpentry mein bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Jab aap hand tools use na kar rahe hon, toh unhe kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Ek tool box ya rack mein neatly organize karke

questions.explanation: Tools ko neatly organize karke rakhne se woh damage hone se bachte hain aur unhe dhundhna bhi aasan hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa wood type generally soft hota hai aur coniferous trees se aata hai?

options.B: Softwood

questions.explanation: Softwood coniferous trees se aata hai aur generally hardwood se softer hota hai.

questions.question: Teak (Saagwan) kis category ka wood hai?

options.B: Hardwood

questions.explanation: Teak ek popular hardwood hai jo uski durability aur resistance ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Wood mein moisture content ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Isse wood ka colour decide hota hai
options.B: Yeh wood ki strength, stability aur working properties ko affect karta hai
options.C: Isse wood ki smell change hoti hai
options.D: Isse wood ka weight kam hota hai

questions.explanation: Wood mein moisture content bahut important hai kyunki yeh uski strength, stability aur kitna accha kaam karega, sabko prabhavit karta hai.

questions.question: Plywood kis tarah ka wood hai?

options.B: Solid softwood

questions.explanation: Plywood ek engineered wood product hai jo thin wood veneers ko ek saath glue karke banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Wood mein knots (gaanthon) ka kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Wood ki strength kam kar sakte hain aur working difficult bana sakte hain
options.D: Wood ko polish karna aasan banaate hain

questions.explanation: Knots wood ki strength ko kam kar sakte hain aur us par kaam karna mushkil bana sakte hain.

questions.question: MDF ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Medium-Density Fiberboard

questions.explanation: MDF ka full form Medium-Density Fiberboard hai, jo ek engineered wood product hai.

questions.question: Wood grain kya hota hai?

options.B: Wood ki surface par fibers ka pattern aur direction

questions.explanation: Wood grain wood ki surface par fibers ka pattern aur direction hota hai, jo uski appearance aur strength ko define karta hai.

questions.question: Softwood ka ek common use kya hai?

options.B: Construction framing aur general purpose ke liye
options.C: High-end musical instruments banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Softwood, jaise ki pine aur spruce, construction framing aur general purpose carpentry mein common hai.

questions.question: Agar wood mein bahut zyada moisture ho, toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Wood warp kar sakta hai, crack ho sakta hai ya rot ho sakta hai
options.C: Wood ka colour dark ho jaayega

questions.explanation: Excessive moisture wood ko warp, crack ya rot kar sakta hai, isliye wood ko season karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hardwood ki kya visheshta hai?

options.B: Deciduous trees se aata hai, dense aur durable hota hai
options.C: Aasani se bend ho jaata hai
options.D: Construction framing mein hi use hota hai

questions.explanation: Hardwood deciduous trees se aata hai aur apni density aur durability ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Particle board (Chipboard) kis cheez se banta hai?

options.B: Wood fibers aur resin
options.C: Wood chips, sawdust aur resin ko compress karke

questions.explanation: Particle board wood chips, sawdust aur resin ko high pressure mein compress karke banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Wood ke storage ke liye sabse acchi condition kya hai?

options.B: Wet aur damp environment mein
options.C: Cool, dry aur well-ventilated area mein

questions.explanation: Wood ko cool, dry aur well-ventilated area mein store karne se woh warp aur crack hone se bachta hai.

questions.question: Laminated Veneer Lumber (LVL) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Yeh solid wood se zyada strong aur stable hota hai
options.C: Iska weight bahut kam hota hai
options.D: Yeh aasani se paint ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: LVL engineered wood hai jo multiple layers of thin wood ko glue karke banaya jaata hai, jisse yeh solid wood se zyada strong aur stable banta hai.

questions.question: Agar wood mein worms ya insects lag gaye hain, toh usko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Checking

questions.explanation: Wood mein worms ya insects lagne ko Insect Infestation kehte hain, jo wood ko damage karta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa wood waterproof properties ke liye jaana jaata hai aur boat building mein use hota hai?

options.B: Oak

questions.explanation: Teak apni natural oils ke karan water resistant hota hai aur boat building mein kaafi use hota hai.

questions.question: Wood ki density ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Wood ka weight per unit volume

questions.explanation: Wood ki density uske weight per unit volume ko darshaati hai, jo uski hardness aur strength se related hoti hai.

questions.question: Wood ki 'seasoning' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Wood se moisture content ko remove karne ke liye taaki woh stable ho jaaye
options.C: Wood ko colour karne ke liye
options.D: Wood ko soft banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Wood ki seasoning (drying) usse moisture remove karne ka process hai, jisse woh warp, shrink ya crack na ho.

questions.question: Measurements mein accuracy kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Project ki fit aur finish sahi rakhne ke liye
options.C: Zyada wood use karne ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Accurate measurements project ki sahi fit, finish aur structural integrity ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Marking gauge ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Wood ke edge ke parallel lines mark karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Marking gauge ka upyog wood ke edge ke parallel accurate lines mark karne ke liye hota hai, jo joints banane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Cross-cut saw ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.A: Wood grain ke parallel kaatne ke liye
options.B: Wood grain ke across (perpendicular) kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cross-cut saw ka upyog wood grain ke across (perpendicular) saaf cut karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Rip saw ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.A: Wood grain ke across kaatne ke liye
options.B: Wood grain ke parallel kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Rip saw ka upyog wood grain ke parallel (lengthwise) kaatne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Miter cut kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek angle cut, generally 45 degrees

questions.explanation: Miter cut ek angle cut hota hai, jise do pieces ko ek specific angle par join karne ke liye banaya jaata hai, jaise ki picture frames mein.

questions.question: Ek combination square ka kya function hai?

options.B: 90 aur 45 degree angles check karna, aur depth/height measurements lena

questions.explanation: Combination square multi-functional tool hai jo 90 aur 45 degree angles check karne, aur depth ya height measurements lene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Chalk line ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Lambe aur seedhe reference lines mark karne ke liye
options.C: Wood ko glue karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Chalk line ka upyog lambe aur seedhe reference lines mark karne ke liye hota hai, especially large boards ya walls par.

questions.question: Jigsaw ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Curved cuts aur intricate shapes kaatne ke liye

questions.explanation: Jigsaw ka upyog curved cuts aur intricate shapes kaatne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Jab ek hand saw use kar rahe hon, toh cut shuru karne ke liye kya technique use karni chahiye?

options.A: Blade ko force karke cut shuru karna
options.B: Blade ko lightly mark par rakhkar gentle strokes se shuru karna
options.C: Kisi bhi angle se cut shuru karna

questions.explanation: Cut ko lightly mark par rakhkar gentle strokes se shuru karna chahiye taaki blade slip na ho aur accurate cut mile.

questions.question: Router ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Decorative edges, grooves, aur joinery profiles banane ke liye
options.C: Wood ko sand karne ke liye
options.D: Nails ko drive karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Router ka upyog wood par decorative edges, grooves, dadoes, aur joinery profiles banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek pencil ka primary use kya hai carpentry mein?

options.B: Measurements ko mark karna

questions.explanation: Pencil ka use measurements ko wood par mark karne ke liye hota hai, jo cutting aur joinery ke liye guide karta hai.

questions.question: Cutting karte samay saw blade ko jam hone se kaise bachayein?

options.B: Workpiece ko tightly clamp karke aur cut ko support karke
options.D: Cut ke beech mein rok kar

questions.explanation: Workpiece ko acchi tarah se clamp karna aur cut ko support karna saw blade ko jam hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Bevel gauge ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Kisi bhi angle ko measure aur transfer karna

questions.explanation: Bevel gauge ka upyog kisi bhi specific angle ko measure karne aur use workpiece par transfer karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Jab aap ek long board ko kaat rahe hain, toh kya precaution lenge?

options.A: Board ko bina support ke kaatna
options.B: Board ko support karna taaki woh sag na ho
options.D: Cut ke beech mein haath rakhna

questions.explanation: Long board ko kaatne se pehle usko acchi tarah se support karna chahiye taaki woh sag na ho aur cut accurate ho.

questions.question: Coping saw ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Intricate curves aur interior cuts ke liye

questions.explanation: Coping saw ka upyog intricate curves aur interior cuts, jaise ki coping joints banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Aapko marking tools ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Unhe sharp aur clean rakhna
options.D: Unhe kisi bhi tarah store karna

questions.explanation: Marking tools ko sharp aur clean rakhne se unki accuracy bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Ek marking knife ka kya fayda hai over pencil?

options.B: Yeh ek fine, precise line banata hai jo cutting ke liye zyada accurate hoti hai
options.C: Yeh wood ko kaat deta hai
options.D: Yeh aasani se erase ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Marking knife ek fine, precise line banata hai jo pencil line se zyada accurate hoti hai, especially joinery ke liye.

questions.question: Butt joint kya hota hai?

options.A: Do pieces ko end-to-end join karna
options.B: Do pieces ko interlocking fingers se join karna
options.C: Ek piece mein slot aur doosre mein tenon
options.D: Do pieces ko overlap karke join karna

questions.explanation: Butt joint sabse simple joint hai jismein do pieces ko seedhe end-to-end join kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Dovetail joint ki kya visheshta hai?

options.B: Yeh interlocking 'tail' aur 'pin' shapes se banta hai aur bahut strong hota hai
options.C: Yeh sirf nails se banta hai
options.D: Yeh aasani se alag ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Dovetail joint uske interlocking 'tail' aur 'pin' shapes ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo use ek bahut strong aur aesthetically pleasing joint banata hai.

questions.question: Wood glue (PVA glue) ka upyog kab kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Nails ko drive karne ke liye
options.B: Wood pieces ko permanently join karne ke liye
options.C: Wood ko polish karne ke liye
options.D: Wood mein holes karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Wood glue ka upyog wood pieces ko permanently join karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Mortise and tenon joint kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Strong, sturdy frame construction ke liye, jaise ki furniture aur doors
options.C: Thin sheets ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Mortise and tenon joint frame construction mein bahut strong aur sturdy joints banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Clamps ka upyog kya hai assembly ke dauran?

options.B: Glued pieces ko tightly hold karna jab tak glue dry na ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Clamps glued pieces ko tightly hold karne ke liye use hote hain, taaki glue acchi tarah se set ho sake.

questions.question: Dowels ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Butt joints ko strengthen karne aur alignment provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dowels butt joints ko strengthen karne aur pieces ko acchi tarah se align karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Pocket hole joinery ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Yeh quick, strong aur hidden fastening provide karta hai
options.C: Isme bahut saare tools lagte hain
options.D: Yeh sirf temporary joints ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Pocket hole joinery quick, strong aur hidden fastening provide karta hai, jo modern carpentry mein popular hai.

questions.question: Screws ka use nails se kaise alag hai?

options.B: Screws zyada strong hold provide karte hain aur disassemble karna aasan hota hai
options.C: Screws sirf soft wood mein use hote hain
options.D: Screws kabhi bhi nikal nahi sakte

questions.explanation: Screws nails se zyada strong hold provide karte hain aur unhe nikalna bhi aasan hota hai, jo disassembly ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: Lap joint kya hota hai?

options.A: Do pieces ko edge-to-edge join karna
options.B: Do pieces ko partially overlap karke join karna
options.C: Ek piece mein hole aur doosre mein peg

questions.explanation: Lap joint mein do pieces ko partially overlap karke join kiya jaata hai, jisse ek flat surface banti hai.

questions.question: Wood glue ke liye 'open time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitni der mein glue dry ho jaata hai
options.B: Kitni der tak glue ko apply karne ke baad pieces ko adjust kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Glue ko kitne temperature par rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Open time woh samay hota hai jab tak glue ko apply karne ke baad pieces ko adjust aur align kiya ja sakta hai usse pehle ki woh set hona shuru ho jaaye.

questions.question: Joints ko assemble karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Joints ki cleanliness aur fit

questions.explanation: Joints ki cleanliness aur tight fit acchi bonding aur strong assembly ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Biscuit joint (plate joiner) ka use kisliye hota hai?

options.A: Strong corner joints banane ke liye
options.B: Panels ko edge-to-edge join karne aur alignment ke liye
options.C: Heavy beams ko join karne ke liye
options.D: Metal aur wood ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Biscuit joiner thin, elliptical wood 'biscuits' use karta hai panels ko edge-to-edge join karne aur unhe align karne ke liye.

questions.question: Nails ka primary use kya hai carpentry mein?

options.B: Quick aur strong fastening ke liye, jahan disassembly ki zaroorat na ho

questions.explanation: Nails quick aur strong fastening provide karte hain, jahan disassembly ki zaroorat nahi hoti.

questions.question: Jab aap ek large panel ko glue kar rahe hain, toh kya technique use karni chahiye?

options.B: Glue ko evenly spread karna poore surface par
options.D: Glue ko dry hone se pehle clamps hata dena

questions.explanation: Glue ko evenly spread karna poore surface par acchi bonding aur strong joint ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Finger joint kya hota hai?

options.B: Interlocking 'fingers' se bana joint, jo lambe pieces banane ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Finger joint interlocking 'fingers' se banta hai, jo short pieces ko join karke lambe aur strong pieces banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Pilot hole ka kya purpose hai screws drive karte samay?

options.B: Wood ko split hone se bachana aur screw ko aasani se drive karna

questions.explanation: Pilot hole wood ko split hone se bachata hai aur screw ko aasani se aur seedhe drive karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Assembly ke baad excess glue ko kaise saaf karna chahiye?

options.A: Dry hone tak wait karna aur phir sand karna
options.B: Jab glue wet ho tabhi damp cloth se saaf karna

questions.explanation: Excess wet glue ko damp cloth se saaf karna chahiye taaki woh dry hokar finish ko kharab na kare.

questions.question: Sanding ka primary purpose kya hai wood par?

options.B: Surface ko smooth aur finish ke liye taiyar karna

questions.explanation: Sanding ka mukhya uddeshya wood surface ko smooth karna aur use finish (paint, varnish) ke liye taiyar karna hai.

questions.question: Wood filler ka upyog kisliye hota hai?

options.B: Small cracks, holes aur imperfections ko fill karne ke liye
options.C: Wood ko glue karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Wood filler ka upyog wood surface par chhote cracks, holes aur imperfections ko bharne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Varnish ka kya fayda hai wood par?

options.B: Wood ko scratch aur moisture se protect karna aur glossy finish dena
options.D: Wood ko split hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Varnish wood ko scratch aur moisture se protect karta hai aur use ek glossy ya satin finish deta hai.

questions.question: Wood staining ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Wood ke natural grain ko enhance karte hue colour dena

questions.explanation: Wood staining wood ke natural grain ko enhance karte hue use ek naya colour deta hai.

questions.question: Doors install karte samay sabse pehle kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Door frame ka level aur squareness

questions.explanation: Door frame ka level aur squareness check karna bahut zaroori hai taaki door sahi se fit ho aur smoothly operate kare.

questions.question: Sanding karte samay kis direction mein sand karna chahiye?

options.B: Wood grain ke across

questions.explanation: Wood grain ke parallel sand karne se scratches kam hote hain aur zyada smooth finish milti hai.

questions.question: Primer ka upyog paint karne se pehle kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Paint ki adhesion badhane aur surface ko seal karne ke liye
options.C: Paint ko jaldi dry karne ke liye
options.D: Paint ko patla karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Primer paint ki adhesion ko badhata hai, surface ko seal karta hai aur topcoat ke liye uniform base provide karta hai.

questions.question: Caulking ka use windows install karte samay kisliye hota hai?

options.A: Windows ko decorate karne ke liye
options.B: Gaps ko seal karna aur air/water leakage rokna
options.C: Windows ko tight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Caulking gaps ko seal karta hai, jisse air aur water leakage rukti hai aur energy efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Shellac finish ki kya visheshta hai?

options.A: Yeh bahut durable aur waterproof hota hai
options.B: Yeh natural finish hai jo jaldi dry hota hai aur repair karna aasan hai
options.C: Yeh sirf outdoor use ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh wood ko bahut dark kar deta hai

questions.explanation: Shellac ek natural finish hai jo jaldi dry hota hai, repair karna aasan hai aur wood ko ek warm glow deta hai.

questions.question: Cabinet installation mein 'scribing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Cabinet ko wall ki uneven surface ke according fit karne ke liye mark aur cut karna

questions.explanation: Scribing ek technique hai jismein cabinet ko wall ki uneven surface ke according mark aur cut kiya jaata hai, taaki ek seamless fit mile.

questions.question: Polyurethane finish ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh wood ko soft banata hai
options.B: Yeh bahut durable aur abrasion-resistant finish provide karta hai
options.C: Yeh aasani se scratch ho jaata hai
options.D: Yeh sirf outdoor use ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Polyurethane ek highly durable aur abrasion-resistant finish hai, jo floors aur high-traffic furniture ke liye accha hai.

questions.question: Hardware, jaise ki hinges aur handles, install karte samay kya precaution lenge?

options.B: Sahi size ke pilot holes drill karna taaki wood split na ho
options.C: Hardware ko force karke fit karna

questions.explanation: Sahi size ke pilot holes drill karne se wood split hone se bachta hai aur hardware securely fit hota hai.

questions.question: Paint brushes ko use ke baad kaise saaf karna chahiye?

options.B: Water ya paint thinner se acchi tarah saaf karna
options.D: Unhe dry hone ke liye chhod dena

questions.explanation: Paint brushes ko water ya paint thinner se acchi tarah saaf karne se woh next use ke liye ready rehte hain.

questions.question: Laminate flooring install karte samay 'expansion gap' kyun chhodna zaroori hai?

options.B: Wood ke natural expansion aur contraction ke liye jagah dena
options.C: Floor ko loose karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Expansion gap wood flooring ko natural temperature aur humidity changes ke karan expand aur contract hone ke liye jagah deta hai, jisse warping se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Window sills install karte samay kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Woh level hon aur proper drainage ke liye slight slope ho

questions.explanation: Window sills ko level hona chahiye aur slight slope hona chahiye taaki baarish ka pani drain ho sake aur window frame ko damage na kare.

questions.question: Finishing ke baad wood ko kitni der tak dry hone dena chahiye before handling?

options.B: Manufacturer ke instructions ke according, generally 24-48 hours

questions.explanation: Finishing products ko manufacturer ke instructions ke according poori tarah dry hone dena chahiye taaki finish durable ho aur damage na ho.

questions.question: Hand saw ko sharp rakhne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh zyada wood use karta hai
options.B: Yeh safer aur zyada efficient cut deta hai

questions.explanation: Sharp hand saw safer hota hai kyunki usse kam force lagani padti hai, aur zyada efficient aur clean cut deta hai.

questions.question: Chisel ko sharp kaise rakha jaata hai?

options.A: Use bina sharpen kiye use karna
options.B: Whetstone ya sharpening stone ka upyog karke
options.C: Kisi bhi rough surface par ragad kar

questions.explanation: Chisel ko whetstone ya sharpening stone ka upyog karke sharp rakha jaata hai taaki woh acchi tarah se cut kar sake.

questions.question: Wood furniture mein loose joint ko kaise repair kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Joint ko disassemble karke, purana glue hata kar, naya glue lagakar aur clamp karke

questions.explanation: Loose joint ko disassemble karke, saaf karke, naya glue lagakar aur clamp karke repair kiya jaata hai taaki woh phir se strong ho jaaye.

questions.question: Wood ke cracks ko fill karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Wood filler ya epoxy

questions.explanation: Wood filler ya epoxy cracks ko fill karne aur surface ko smooth banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Carpentry drawings mein 'elevation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Object ka front, side ya back view

questions.explanation: Elevation drawing object ka front, side ya back view dikhati hai, jisse uski height aur width pata chalti hai.

questions.question: Material estimating karte samay kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Wood type, dimensions, waste factor aur cost

questions.explanation: Material estimating mein wood type, dimensions, waste factor aur cost jaise factors ko consider karna zaroori hai taaki accurate budget ban sake.

questions.question: Screws ko lubricate karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Unhe drive karna aasan banana aur wood splitting kam karna

questions.explanation: Screws ko wax ya soap se lubricate karne se unhe drive karna aasan ho jaata hai aur wood splitting ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Environmental sustainability in woodworking ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Responsibly sourced wood use karna, waste kam karna aur eco-friendly finishes use karna

questions.explanation: Environmental sustainability ka matlab hai responsibly sourced wood use karna, waste kam karna aur eco-friendly finishes use karna taaki environment ko nuksan na ho.

questions.question: Woodworm damage ko kaise treat kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Chemical treatment ya affected wood ko replace karke

questions.explanation: Woodworm damage ko chemical treatment ya affected wood ko replace karke treat kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Carpentry drawings mein 'plan view' kya dikhata hai?

options.B: Object ka top-down view

questions.explanation: Plan view object ka top-down view dikhata hai, jisse uski layout aur horizontal dimensions pata chalti hain.

questions.question: Agar ek wooden door swell ho gaya hai aur jam ho raha hai, toh kya solution hai?

options.B: Extra wood ko plane karke ya sand karke remove karna

questions.explanation: Swollen door ko plane ya sand karke extra wood remove kiya jaata hai taaki woh smoothly operate kare.

questions.question: Wood ki warping ko kaise minimize kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Wood ko wet environment mein store karke
options.B: Proper seasoning, storage aur finish apply karke
options.C: Wood ko direct sunlight mein rakh kar

questions.explanation: Proper seasoning, controlled storage environment aur acchi finish apply karne se wood ki warping ko minimize kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Power tools ki regular maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Blades change karna, brushes check karna, lubrication aur cleaning

questions.explanation: Power tools ki regular maintenance mein blades change karna, brushes check karna, lubrication aur cleaning shamil hai taaki woh acchi tarah se kaam karein.

questions.question: Cost-effective material selection ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Project budget ke andar rehna aur quality maintain karna

questions.explanation: Cost-effective material selection se project budget ke andar rehte hue bhi acchi quality maintain ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek old furniture piece repair karna hai, toh sabse pehle kya karenge?

options.A: Turant paint karna shuru kar denge
options.B: Damage ko inspect karna aur repair plan banana

questions.explanation: Repair karne se pehle damage ko acchi tarah se inspect karna aur ek proper repair plan banana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Carpentry mein 'waste factor' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Extra material jo cutting, defects ya mistakes ke karan discard ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Waste factor woh extra material hota hai jo cutting, defects ya mistakes ke karan discard ho jaata hai, aur isse material estimating mein consider karna chahiye.
